44 AA2 AA2_SEX1 2(AA2) Sex CHAR 1 The patient's sex 0 = Uknown, 1 = Male, 2 = Female
45 AA3 AA3_BIRTH_DT 3(AA3)Birthdate DATE 8 The patient's birthdate.
46 A5 A5_MARTIAL_STATUS 4(A5)Marital Status CHAR 1 The patient's current marital status. -1 = Unknown, 1 = Never married, 2 = Married, 3 = Widowed, 4 = Separated, 5 = Divorced
